title: Ami Chokshi
compiled_truth: Ami Chokshi is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-03 to 2000-11-02), Ami Chokshi sent 187 and received 444 emails, totalling 631 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (185), [Carlos Rodriguez](people/carlos-rodriguez) (73), [Thu Nguyen](people/thu-nguyen) (66), [Kyle Lilly](people/kyle-lilly) (52), [George Grant](people/george-grant) (51).
